## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No deploy
- [ ] No payment activation
- [ ] No real writer/output
- [ ] No real keyboard export
- [ ] No proprietary samples
- [ ] No false premium claims
- [ ] Tests/build status is documented
- [ ] Files touched are listed
- [ ] Cost-risk estimate is included
